66 using namespace Arcane;

78 
79 class FemModuleElasticity
80 : public ArcaneFemObject
81 , public ArcGeoSim::ICAWFMng::ITimeIterStateOp
82 {
83  public:
84 
85  explicit FemModuleElasticity(const ModuleBuildInfo& mbi)
86  : ArcaneFemObject(mbi)
87  , m_dofs_on_nodes(mbi.subDomain()->traceMng())
88  , m_bsr_format(mbi.subDomain()->traceMng(), *(mbi.subDomain()->acceleratorMng()->defaultQueue()), m_dofs_on_nodes)
89  //, m_alien_bsr_format(mbi.subDomain()->traceMng(), *(mbi.subDomain()->acceleratorMng()->defaultQueue()), m_dofs_on_nodes)
90  {
91  ICaseMng* cm = mbi.subDomain()->caseMng();
92  cm->setTreatWarningAsError(true);
93  cm->setAllowUnkownRootElelement(false);
94  }
95 
96  void saveOldState();
97  void reloadOldState();
98  void init() override;
99  void startInit() override;
100  void computeDivU() override;
101  void test() override;
102  VersionInfo versionInfo() const override { return VersionInfo(1, 0, 0); }
103 
104  void _updateTopBoundary(CellGroup const& new_event);
105  void _doStationarySolve();
106  template<typename ProfilerT>
107  void _defineMatrixProfile(ProfilerT& profiler, ConstArrayView<Integer> allUIndex) ;
108 #ifdef ALIEN_USE_SYCL
109  void _defineMatrixProfileAcc() ;
110 #endif
111  void _assembleBilinearOperator();
112 #ifdef ALIEN_USE_SYCL
113  void _assembleBilinearOperatorAlienAcc() ;
114 #endif
115  void _assembleDirichletsGpu();
116 
117  void _computePrePro();
118  void _computePostPro();
119 
120  private:
121 
122  DoFLinearSystem m_linear_system;
123  FemDoFsOnNodes m_dofs_on_nodes;
124  BSRFormat m_bsr_format;
125  AlienBSRFormat* m_alien_bsr_format = nullptr;
126  Arcane::FemUtils::AlienDoFLinearSystemImpl* m_alien_linear_system = nullptr;
127 
128  UniqueArray<Integer> m_dof_dof_connection_index;
129  UniqueArray<Integer> m_dof_dof_connection_offset;
130 
131  Real3 m_F;
132  Real E;
133  Real nu;
134  //Real mu;
135  //Real lambda;
136 
137  //Real3 f;
138  Real3 t;
139  bool m_applyBodyForce = false;
140 
141  Int8 m_dof_per_node;
142 
143  String m_petsc_flags;
144  String m_matrix_format = "DOK";
145 
146  bool m_assemble_linear_system = true;
147  bool m_solve_linear_system = true;
148  bool m_cross_validation = false;
149  bool m_hex_quad_mesh = false;
150 
151  Real m_dt = 0. ;
152  Real m_time = 0. ;
153  int m_iter = 0 ;
154  Integer m_max_iter = 0 ;
155  Real m_gravity = 9.8;
156  Real m_top_z = 0. ;
157  Real m_event_period = 0. ;
158  Real m_next_event_time = 0. ;
159  Integer m_event_index = 0 ;
160  Integer m_new_layer_id = 0 ;
161  bool m_precice_mesh_is_updated = false;
162 
163  UniqueArray<Arcane::CellGroup> m_layers ;
164  Real m_layer_event_period = 0. ;
165  Real m_layer_event_time = 0. ;
166  Real m_next_layer_event_time = 0. ;
167  UniqueArray<Int64> m_activated_layers_uids;
168 
169  IParallelMng* m_parallel_mng = nullptr;
170  ShArc::IDynamicMeshMng* m_dynamic_mesh_mng = nullptr;
171  ArcGeoSim::ICAWFMng* m_cawf_mng = nullptr ;
172  IGeometryMng * m_geometry_mng = nullptr;
173  NoOptimizationGeometryPolicy m_geometry_policy ;
174  Alien::ILinearSolver * m_linear_solver = nullptr;
175 
176  void _getMaterialParameters(CellGroup const& cells);
177  void _solve();
178  void _assembleLinearOperator();
179  void _validateResults();
180  void _updateVariables();
181  void _initBsr();
182  void _initAlienBsr();
183 
184  inline void _applyBodyForce(VariableDoFReal& rhs_values, const IndexedNodeDoFConnectivityView& node_dof);
185  inline void _applyTraction(VariableDoFReal& rhs_values, const IndexedNodeDoFConnectivityView& node_dof);
186  inline void _applyDirichlet(VariableDoFReal& rhs_values, const IndexedNodeDoFConnectivityView& node_dof);
187 
188  RealMatrix<6, 6> _computeElementMatrixTria3(Cell cell);
189  RealMatrix<12, 12> _computeElementMatrixTetra4(Cell cell);
190  RealMatrix<8, 8> _computeElementMatrixQuad4(Cell cell);
191  RealMatrix<24, 24> _computeElementMatrixHexa8(Cell cell);
192  Real3 _computeElementGradientHexa8(Cell cell);
193  Real _computeElementDiv(Cell cell);
194 
195  template <int N>
196  void _assembleBilinearOperatorCpu(const std::function<RealMatrix<N, N>(const Cell&)>& compute_element_matrix);
197 
198  template <class FunctionT>
199  void _assembleBilinearOperatorGpu(const FunctionT& compute_element_matrix);
200 };
201 
202 template<typename ProfilerT>
203 void FemModuleElasticity::
204 _defineMatrixProfile(ProfilerT& profiler, ConstArrayView<Integer> allUIndex)
205 {
207  //
208  // DEFINE PROFILE
209  //
210  const Int32 dim = mesh()->dimension();
211  auto node_dof(m_dofs_on_nodes.nodeDoFConnectivityView());
212  ENUMERATE_ (Cell, icell, mesh()->allCells())
213  {
214  Cell cell = *icell;
215  for (Node node1 : cell.nodes())
216  {
217  if (node1.isOwn())
218  {
219  for (Node node2 : cell.nodes())
220  {
221  for (Int32 i = 0; i < dim; ++i)
222  {
223  DoFLocalId dof1 = node_dof.dofId(node1, i);
224  for (Int32 j = 0; j < dim; ++j)
225  {
226  DoFLocalId dof2 = node_dof.dofId(node2, j);
227  profiler.addMatrixEntry(allUIndex[dof1.localId()], allUIndex[dof2.localId()]);
228  }
229  }
230  }
231  }
232  }
233  }
234 }
235 
236 #endif

A class for assembling Block Sparse Row (BSR) matrices from mesh data.
